g++ -O3 -shared -std=c++20 -fPIC -I/usr/include/python3.14 $(python3 -m pybind11 --includes) server_wrapper.cpp -o mi_servidor_udp$(python3-config --extension-suffix) -lpthread

g++ -O3 -shared -std=c++20 -fPIC -I/usr/include/python3.14 $(python3 -m pybind11 --includes) client_wrapper.cpp -o mi_cliente_udp$(python3-config --extension-suffix) -lpthread

not working
python3 setup.py build_ext --inplace





source venv/bin/activate.fish
./venv/bin/python slave.py
./venv/bin/python -m pip install scikit-learn
